title: Tasty Thick Uruguayan Sausages Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with German sausages and puff pastry, perfect for a sick day. This dish is also ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly and features fermented ingredients.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped onions, minced garlic, chopped carrots, and chopped potatoes.
In a large pot or Dutch oven, brown the German sausages over medium-high heat, then set aside.
Add the olive oil to the pot, then add the onion mixture and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the chicken broth, sauerkraut, and browned sausages to the pot, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Brush the edges of the puff pastry with the beaten egg.
Place the puff pastry over the pot, pressing the edges to seal.
Bake the stew in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
